# Euxis Documentation

> Euxis: 42 AI agents that coordinate to handle engineering tasks. Deploy in seconds.

## Quick Start
- [Quick Start Guide](docs/essentials/quick-start.md): Get your first agent running in 5 minutes
- [Installation](README.md#quick-start): Clone, setup, verify

## Core Commands
- `euxis check <target>` - Standard analysis (5 agents)
- `euxis triage <target>` - Fast flash triage (2 agents)
- `euxis review <target>` - Standard review, supports --forensic
- `euxis certify-readiness <target>` - 18-domain certification assessment
- `euxis compare <target>` - Compare against baseline
- `euxis stats` - Historical statistics
- `euxis health` - Fleet integrity check

## Agents (41 total)

### Core Agents (9)
- `orchestrator` - Breaks down goals, coordinates specialists
- `architect` - Designs systems, defines patterns
- `planner` - Scopes work, prioritizes tasks
- `reviewer` - Quality gate for all output
- `critic` - Challenges assumptions, surfaces risks
- `auditor` - Legal, privacy, compliance authority
- `arbiter` - Resolves conflicts between agents
- `librarian` - Knowledge governance
- `historian` - Long-term memory patterns

### Default Agents (21)
`accountant`, `animator`, `automaton`, `debugger`, `designer`, `gatekeeper`, `inspector`, `interactor`, `investigator`, `maintainer`, `optimizer`, `pentester`, `polyglot`, `repairer`, `responder`, `sentinel`, `tactician`, `telemetrist`, `tester`, `watchdog`, `writer`

### On-Demand Agents (7)
`ambassador`, `butler`, `evangelist`, `localizer`, `marketer`, `researcher`, `strategist`

### Specialist Agents (4)
`cryptographer`, `ledger`, `conduit`, `custodian`

## Coordination Patterns

### Single Agent
```bash
euxis debugger "Why does login return null?"
```

### Combo (Sequential Chain)
```bash
euxis-combo run envision "Design onboarding flow"
# Chain: planner → architect → evangelist → reviewer
```

### Squad (Parallel Team)
```bash
euxis-squad deploy quality "Audit auth module"
# Deploys: reviewer, inspector, pentester, auditor + 4 more
```

### Playbook (Multi-Phase)
```bash
euxis-playbook run zero-to-one "Launch feature" --dry-run
# Phases: Vision → Build → Quality → Growth
```

## Memory System (Cortex)
```bash
# Store knowledge
euxis-cortex remember "API uses OAuth 2.0" "architect" --type semantic

# Recall knowledge
euxis-cortex recall "authentication" --type procedural
```

Memory types: `episodic` (events), `semantic` (facts), `procedural` (workflows)

## Provider Routing
Automatic selection based on task:
- Strategic agents → `claude` (best reasoning)
- Research agents → `gemini` (large context)
- Coding agents → `goose` (tool use)
- Utility agents → `ollama` (fast, local)

Override: `euxis architect "task" gemini`

## Available Squads
- `vision` - Strategic planning (6 agents)
- `build` - Implementation (6 agents)
- `quality` - Verification (8 agents)
- `growth` - Marketing/docs (6 agents)
- `experience` - UI/UX (4 agents)
- `specialist` - Domain expertise (4 agents)

## Available Combos
- `envision` - Product design
- `protect` - Security audit
- `refine` - UI design
- `craft` - Content creation
- `seal` - Crypto audit
- `settle` - Payments validation

## Documentation
- [User Guide](docs/guides/user-guide.md): Complete CLI reference
- [Fleet Guide](docs/guides/fleet-guide.md): All 42 agents detailed
- [UI Guide](docs/guides/ui-guide.md): Terminal interface
- [Concepts](docs/essentials/core-concepts/): Core concepts explained
- [Workflows](docs/guides/workflows/): Problem-to-solution tutorials
- [API Reference](docs/reference/api-reference.md): Technical reference
- [CLI Reference](docs/reference/cli-reference.md): All commands

## Troubleshooting
- `euxis health` - Run fleet integrity check
- `euxis certify-readiness .` - Full certification assessment
- PATH issue: `export PATH="$HOME/.euxis/euxis-bin:$PATH"`

## Requirements
- CMake 3.28+, GCC 14+ or Clang 18+ (C++23)
- At least one AI provider (Ollama recommended for local)

---
Euxis v0.0.4 | https://euxis.co/
